name: Cursed Spire Spell
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Spawns an explosive spike in current player location that explodes after 0.6 seconds Spell: 16 Shots on self Mayhem Aegis: On ability use, 50% chance of DEF Boost (+15 DEF) on self for 6 seconds Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
